description: In the WordPress admin panel, create and publish a new page titled 'Space Exploration Archive' to serve as a document archive. The page must include a Table of Contents using a List block with items 'Apollo 11', 'James Webb Space Telescope', and 'Mars 2020', linked to corresponding H2 headings via unique HTML anchors. Under each heading, insert a File block for the respective PDF located at /home/ga/Documents/Archive/, ensuring each file is configured to open in a new tab.
